name: Cariton Sofa/Console Table Gray - Signature Design by Ashley: Plank-Effect, Farmhouse Style
description: This designer sofa or console table masters the art of simplicity. Bold, blocky profile is enriched with plank-effect styling and a textured grayish brown finish for a look that’s cool and contemporary and a vibe that’s warm and inviting. Stylish and affordable furniture and accessories are more than a dream. For more than 70 years, Ashley Furniture has furnished millions of homes, one beautiful piece at a time. We design and build furniture, then test it for lasting quality and functionality—so you’ll love the look and the price. Signature Design by Ashley is a registered trademark of Ashley Furniture Industries, Inc.
